title: Vintage Rolex Submariner 1968
description: A rare vintage Rolex Submariner in excellent condition. Original dial, crown, and bracelet. Comes with original box and papers. A true collector's piece.

title: Original Banksy Canvas Print - 'Girl with Balloon'
description: Authenticated original Banksy canvas print with certificate of authenticity. Museum-quality framing. One of only 50 prints ever released.

title: 2023 Gibson Les Paul Custom - Ebony
description: Brand new 2023 Gibson Les Paul Custom in stunning Ebony finish. AAA maple top, mahogany body, and premium hardware. Includes hardshell case.

title: Apple Mac Pro M2 Ultra - Full Setup
description: Latest Apple Mac Pro with M2 Ultra chip, 192GB RAM, 8TB SSD. Includes Apple Pro Display XDR and Magic peripherals. Barely used, under warranty.

title: 1957 Chevrolet Bel Air - Fully Restored
description: Beautifully restored 1957 Chevy Bel Air in classic two-tone red and white. Original V8 engine rebuilt to spec. New interior, chrome detailing, and rust-free body.

title: Signed Michael Jordan 1991 Championship Jersey
description: Authentic game-worn Chicago Bulls jersey from the 1991 NBA Championship season, personally signed by Michael Jordan. Includes PSA/DNA full letter of authenticity.
